experience.description: Successfully transitioned from the CSD training program to a full-time role by demonstrating proficiency in enterprise technologies and passing rigorous technical assessments.
highlights: Completed Certified Skill Development (CSD) training with a focus on real-world practical projects.
Collaborated with professional trainers and passed routine technical assessments and interviews.
Applied theoretical knowledge to practical usage projects during the intensive training phase.

experience.description: Led the technical direction for the training and placement cell's web presence.
highlights: Reduced website loading time by 66% through aggressive code refactoring and optimization.
Developed and maintained responsive web layouts for a seamless user experience.
Managed a team of junior students, facilitating weekly feature planning and task delegation.

experience.description: Focused on building complex real-time communication tools and secure authentication systems.
highlights: Architected a video conferencing and chat platform utilizing WebRTC and Socket.io.
Implemented a secure user authentication system using JWT (JSON Web Tokens).
Developed reusable and responsive UI components for the core product.

education.description: Focused on core Computer Science fundamentals, including DSA, DBMS, and Operating Systems, while maintaining active participation in competitive programming.
